name: DataTable
description: Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

api.name: DataTable
api.description: Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The rows to render. Enumerated once per parameter set into _itemsList; null or empty renders EmptyTemplate (or the built-in "No results" placeholder) instead of the table body.

parameters.name: HeaderTemplate
parameters.description: Header cells rendered inside the single <tr> of <thead>, after the selection checkbox column (if Selectable is on). Typically one <th> per column, e.g. via DataTableSortableHeader.

parameters.name: RowTemplate
parameters.description: Per-row content, rendered once for each item in Items and given the current item as its context. Typically one <td> per column.

parameters.name: LoadingTemplate
parameters.description: Content rendered inside each skeleton row while IsLoading is true. Rendered SkeletonRows times.

parameters.name: EmptyTemplate
parameters.description: Content shown in place of the table body when Items is null or empty. Falls back to a centered "No results." message when unset.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows SkeletonRows loading rows (via LoadingTemplate) instead of the real data while true.

parameters.name: SkeletonRows
parameters.description: Number of skeleton rows rendered while IsLoading is true. Default 5.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <table> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer scrollable wrapper <div>.

parameters.name: SortColumn
parameters.description: The currently sorted column's identifier, as set by a header (e.g. Column). Two-way bindable via SortColumnChanged; the table itself does not sort Items — sorting is left to the consumer.

parameters.name: SortColumnChanged
parameters.description: Raised when SortColumn changes.

parameters.name: SortDir
parameters.description: The current sort direction for SortColumn. Default Ascending.

parameters.name: SortDirChanged
parameters.description: Raised when SortDir changes.

parameters.name: OnSort
parameters.description: Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items.

parameters.name: Selectable
parameters.description: Enables row selection: renders a checkbox column (with a "select all" checkbox in the header) and aria-selected/aria-multiselectable on the grid.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: The currently selected rows. Two-way bindable via SelectedItemsChanged; membership is decided by ItemKey when supplied, otherwise by reference/value equality.

parameters.name: SelectedItemsChanged
parameters.description: Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update.

parameters.name: ItemKey
parameters.description: Optional stable-key selector for selection membership. When TItem is a plain reference type (not a record / value type), the default HashSet{T} compares by object reference — so refreshing Items with new instances that are value-equal but reference-distinct silently drops the selection highlight. Supply a key (e.g. p => p.Id) and membership is decided by that key instead of reference identity, so selection survives a same-content refresh. When null, membership falls back to SelectedItems.Contains(item) (reference/value equality), preserving the original behaviour.

parameters.name: AriaColCount
parameters.description: Total column count reported via aria-colcount on the grid (including the selection column when Selectable is on). Set this when the header/row templates render a fixed number of columns so assistive tech can announce "column X of N". 0 (default) omits the attribute since the count can't be inferred from consumer templates.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: Virtualize the row list using Blazor's <Virtualize> — only renders rows in the viewport.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in pixels used by the virtualizer (default 41). Only relevant when Virtualize is true.

events.name: OnSort
events.description: Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items.

events.name: SelectedItemsChanged
events.description: Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: Status Email Amount @payment.Status @payment.Email $@payment.Amount

examples.title: Loading State
examples.code: ... ...

examples.title: Empty State
examples.code:
<DataTable Items="Array.Empty<Item>()" TItem="Item">
    <HeaderTemplate>...</HeaderTemplate>
    <EmptyTemplate>
        <EmptyState Title="No data" Description="Nothing to display." />
    </EmptyTemplate>
    <RowTemplate>...</RowTemplate>
</DataTable>

examples.title: Sortable Columns
examples.code: Name Email Role @context.Name @context.Email @context.Role @code { private string? _sortColumn; private DataTable.SortDirection _sortDir = DataTable.SortDirection.None; private void HandleSort((string Column, DataTable.SortDirection Direction) sort) { _sortColumn = sort.Column; _sortDir = sort.Direction; } }

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The header's label content, rendered before the sort direction icon inside the clickable button.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: Identifier for the column this header controls. Compared against SortColumn to decide which sort icon to show and passed back on OnSort.

parameters.name: SortColumn
parameters.description: The DataTable{TItem}'s currently sorted column, typically bound to DataTable.SortColumn. When it matches Column, the header shows an active (ascending/descending) icon instead of the neutral one.

parameters.name: SortDirection
parameters.description: The current sort direction for this column when it is the active SortColumn, typically bound to DataTable.SortDir.

parameters.name: OnSort
parameters.description: Raised on click with this header's Column and the next direction in the ascending → descending → none cycle.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <th> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <th> element.

events.name: OnSort
events.description: Raised on click with this header's Column and the next direction in the ascending → descending → none cycle.

slots.name: HeaderTemplate
slots.description: Header cells rendered inside the single <tr> of <thead>, after the selection checkbox column (if Selectable is on). Typically one <th> per column, e.g. via DataTableSortableHeader.

slots.name: RowTemplate
slots.description: Per-row content, rendered once for each item in Items and given the current item as its context. Typically one <td> per column.

slots.name: LoadingTemplate
slots.description: Content rendered inside each skeleton row while IsLoading is true. Rendered SkeletonRows times.

slots.name: EmptyTemplate
slots.description: Content shown in place of the table body when Items is null or empty. Falls back to a centered "No results." message when unset.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The header's label content, rendered before the sort direction icon inside the clickable button.

mdSummary:
# DataTable

Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

**Package:** `Lumeo.DataGrid` · **Category:** Data Display/Tables
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/data-table

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DataTable | Items | `IEnumerable<TItem>?` | `` | The rows to render. Enumerated once per parameter set into _itemsList; null or empty renders EmptyTemplate (or the built-in "No results" placeholder) instead of the table body. |
| DataTable | HeaderTemplate | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Header cells rendered inside the single \<tr\> of \<thead\>, after the selection checkbox column (if Selectable is on). Typically one \<th\> per column, e.g. via DataTableSortableHeader. |
| DataTable | RowTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` | Per-row content, rendered once for each item in Items and given the current item as its context. Typically one \<td\> per column. |
| DataTable | LoadingTemplate | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered inside each skeleton row while IsLoading is true. Rendered SkeletonRows times. |
| DataTable | EmptyTemplate | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content shown in place of the table body when Items is null or empty. Falls back to a centered "No results." message when unset. |
| DataTable | IsLoading | `bool` | `false` | Shows SkeletonRows loading rows (via LoadingTemplate) instead of the real data while true. |
| DataTable | SkeletonRows | `int` | `5` | Number of skeleton rows rendered while IsLoading is true. Default 5. |
| DataTable | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<table\> element. |
| DataTable | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer scrollable wrapper \<div\>. |
| DataTable | SortColumn | `string?` | `` | The currently sorted column's identifier, as set by a header (e.g. Column). Two-way bindable via SortColumnChanged; the table itself does not sort Items — sorting is left to the consumer. |
| DataTable | SortColumnChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Raised when SortColumn changes. |
| DataTable | SortDir | `SortDirection` | `SortDirection.Ascending` | The current sort direction for SortColumn. Default Ascending. |
| DataTable | SortDirChanged | `EventCallback<SortDirection>` | `` | Raised when SortDir changes. |
| DataTable | OnSort | `EventCallback<(string Column, SortDirection Direction)>` | `` | Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items. |
| DataTable | Selectable | `bool` | `false` | Enables row selection: renders a checkbox column (with a "select all" checkbox in the header) and aria-selected/aria-multiselectable on the grid. |
| DataTable | SelectedItems | `HashSet<TItem>?` | `` | The currently selected rows. Two-way bindable via SelectedItemsChanged; membership is decided by ItemKey when supplied, otherwise by reference/value equality. |
| DataTable | SelectedItemsChanged | `EventCallback<HashSet<TItem>>` | `` | Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update. |
| DataTable | ItemKey | `Func<TItem, object>?` | `` | Optional stable-key selector for selection membership. When TItem is a plain reference type (not a record / value type), the default HashSet{T} compares by object reference — so refreshing Items with new instances that are value-equal but reference-distinct silently drops the selection highlight. Supply a key (e.g. p =\> p.Id) and membership is decided by that key instead of reference identity, so selection survives a same-content refresh. When null, membership falls back to SelectedItems.Contains(item) (reference/value equality), preserving the original behaviour. |
| DataTable | AriaColCount | `int` | `0` | Total column count reported via aria-colcount on the grid (including the selection column when Selectable is on). Set this when the header/row templates render a fixed number of columns so assistive tech can announce "column X of N". 0 (default) omits the attribute since the count can't be inferred from consumer templates. |
| DataTable | Virtualize | `bool` | `false` | Virtualize the row list using Blazor's \<Virtualize\> — only renders rows in the viewport. |
| DataTable | ItemSize | `float` | `48` | Estimated row height in pixels used by the virtualizer (default 41). Only relevant when Virtualize is true. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The header's label content, rendered before the sort direction icon inside the clickable button. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | Column | `string` | `""` | Identifier for the column this header controls. Compared against SortColumn to decide which sort icon to show and passed back on OnSort. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | SortColumn | `string?` | `` | The DataTable{TItem}'s currently sorted column, typically bound to DataTable.SortColumn. When it matches Column, the header shows an active (ascending/descending) icon instead of the neutral one. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | SortDirection | `DataTable<object>.SortDirection` | `None` | The current sort direction for this column when it is the active SortColumn, typically bound to DataTable.SortDir. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | OnSort | `EventCallback<(string Column, DataTable<object>.SortDirection Direction)>` | `` | Raised on click with this header's Column and the next direction in the ascending → descending → none cycle. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<th\> element. |
| DataTableSortableHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the \<th\> element. |

## Slots
- `HeaderTemplate` (DataTable) — Header cells rendered inside the single \<tr\> of \<thead\>, after the selection checkbox column (if Selectable is on). Typically one \<th\> per column, e.g. via DataTableSortableHeader.
- `RowTemplate` (DataTable) — Per-row content, rendered once for each item in Items and given the current item as its context. Typically one \<td\> per column.
- `LoadingTemplate` (DataTable) — Content rendered inside each skeleton row while IsLoading is true. Rendered SkeletonRows times.
- `EmptyTemplate` (DataTable) — Content shown in place of the table body when Items is null or empty. Falls back to a centered "No results." message when unset.
- `ChildContent` (DataTableSortableHeader) — The header's label content, rendered before the sort direction icon inside the clickable button.

## Events
- `SortColumnChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Raised when SortColumn changes.
- `SortDirChanged` (`EventCallback<SortDirection>`) — Raised when SortDir changes.
- `OnSort` (`EventCallback<(string Column, SortDirection Direction)>`) — Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items.
- `SelectedItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<HashSet<TItem>>`) — Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update.

## Sub-components
- `DataTableSortableHeader`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DataTable />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/DataTable/DataTable.razor`
- `UI/DataTable/DataTableSortableHeader.razor`
